title: bridelia scleroneura subsp. scleroneura
intro: Bridelia scleroneura subsp. scleroneura, also known as the Bristly Bristle or Bristly Bridelia, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiproliferative activities. The health benefits of Bridelia scleroneura subsp. scleroneura include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in traditional medicine, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made from the leaves, roots, or bark.
